description_cn: Uses Soft Open Point active reactive-power support and active-power transfer to mitigate feeder-end voltage violations and active-load imbalance in grids with high distributed renewable penetration or dynamic loads.
description_en: Simulates dynamic active and reactive power control by Soft Open Points (SOP) to mitigate voltage violation and imbalance.
typical_user_requests: Simulate SOP active and reactive power regulation
Create an SOP control scenario for feeder-end voltage violations

use_sop.description: Whether SOP is enabled; enabling it is recommended for this scenario.

validation_rules.message_cn: SOP control must be enabled for this scenario; the current configuration conflicts with the scenario semantics.
The configured SOP capacity exceeds 1500 kVA. Confirm that it matches the capacity level of the selected test grid.

result_interpretation_focus: Inspect SOP active and reactive power output during peak load and high PV periods to verify bidirectional power-flow balancing.
Evaluate improvements in minimum and maximum feeder-end voltage and the degree of voltage-violation mitigation.
Compare exact total grid loss before and after enabling SOP to assess the effect of active-power transfer on line losses.
